allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d etl_db -c "SELECT version\(\);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS etl_db;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE etl_db ENCODING ''UTF8'';")
